name: Passover Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat honey until it boils.
2. Add orange juice and grated orange rind, then let cool.
3. Beat the egg yolks.
4. Gradually add oil and sugar to the beaten yolks.
5. Sift together matzo meal and dry ingredients (salt, cinnamon, cloves).
6. Combine the dry ingredients with the honey into the yolk mixture.
7. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
8. Pour the batter into an oblong or two loaf pans lined with wax paper.
9. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes.
